description: AI-batch entries verified via forward PubMed search + PMC full-text + DailyMed FDA label. ADA values confirmed from real sources. These entries override the AI-batch exclusion and enter the verifiable database with corrected values.

entries.evidence_excerpt: Anti-drug antibodies developed in 25% of patients and were low titer and transient, with no observed clinical effect in most cases.
entries.source_paper: Long-term efficacy and safety of subcutaneous concizumab prophylaxis in hemophilia A and hemophilia A/B with inhibitors

entries.evidence_excerpt: The pooled ADA rates were 14.29% for ixekizumab (from meta-analysis of 86 studies, total 42,280 individuals).
entries.source_paper: Formation and clinical effects of anti-drug antibodies against biologics in psoriasis treatment: An analysis of current evidence

entries.evidence_excerpt: Treatment-induced immunogenicity was found in 2.5% of lokivetmab treated dogs.
entries.source_paper: A blinded, randomized, placebo-controlled trial of the safety of lokivetmab (ZTS-00103289), a caninized anti-canine IL-31 monoclonal antibody in client-owned dogs with atopic dermatitis

entries.ada_value_verified: 29.2% (with MTX, OHZORA trial); 44.3% (without MTX, NATSUZORA trial)
entries.evidence_excerpt: ADA induction was observed in 29.2% (OHZORA) and 44.3% (NATSUZORA) of participants; NAb expression was observed in 7.5% and 19.3%, respectively.
entries.source_paper: Impact of Anti-Drug Antibodies and Neutralising Antibodies on Safety and Efficacy of Ozoralizumab in Rheumatoid Arthritis

entries.evidence_excerpt: More than 90% of the patients with AD randomized to the study drug had TE-ADAs 3 months after the first dose.
entries.source_paper: Donanemab (LY3002813) dose-escalation study in Alzheimer's disease

entries.evidence_excerpt: The incidence of anti-eptinezumab-jjmr antibody development in Study 1 (up to 56 weeks) was 20.6% (92/447). In Study 2 (up to 32 weeks), the incidence was 18.3% (129/706).
entries.source_paper: FDA label Section 6.2 Immunogenicity via DailyMed

entries.evidence_excerpt: There was a low incidence of ADA-positive patients (approximately 10%) in the phase 3 trials.
entries.source_paper: Ocular Pharmacokinetics of Faricimab Following Intravitreal Administration

entries.evidence_excerpt: Treatment-emergent anti-drug antibodies were observed in 0.4% (6 out of 1701) AJOVY-treated patients. In the long-term open-label study, anti-drug antibodies were detected in 1.6% (30/1888).
entries.source_paper: FDA label Section 6.2 via DailyMed; corroborated by PK modelling paper

entries.evidence_excerpt: Anti-drug antibody (ADA) presence was assessed, and it was found that 35 (15.75%) patients were positive for ADAs. Out of these, 31 (13.9%) had developed ADAs for the first time.
entries.source_paper: Itolizumab - a humanized anti-CD6 monoclonal antibody with a better side effects profile

entries.evidence_excerpt: 10 (12%) lanadelumab-flyo-treated and 2 (5%) placebo-treated patients had at least 1 anti-drug antibody (ADA)-positive sample during the 26-week treatment period.
3.4% (30/883) of patients treated with LEQEMBI 10 mg/kg every two weeks developed treatment-emergent anti-lecanemab-irmb antibodies.
In Study 201, 2 of 24 (8%) patients tested positive for anti-drug antibodies (ADA) after treatment with DANYELZA.
In Trial 04, 5% (95/1778) of subjects were ADA-positive on Day 361. In Trial 03, 3.3% (16/492) subjects were ADA-positive on Day 361.
Treatment-emergent antibodies to ravulizumab-cwvz were detected in 1 of 219 (0.5%) patients with PNH.
The incidence of retifanlimab treatment-emergent ADAs was 2.8% (3/106) using a bridging ELISA following a median exposure of 12.3 months.
9 (1.1%) of 785 patients developed antibodies to sacituzumab govitecan; 6 of these patients (0.8%) had neutralizing antibodies.
During the maximum 3-year treatment period, 8% (36/445) of patients who received IMDELLTRA developed treatment-emergent anti-tarlatamab antibodies.
entries.source_paper: Pharmacokinetics of Tarlatamab (PMC full text); corroborated by FDA label
